title: AgentAuthority
description: The authority envelope for an AI agent. Defines what the agent may do, on whose behalf, and under what constraints.

id.description: Unique identifier for this authority envelope.

agentId.description: The identifier of the agent receiving this authority.

principalId.description: The identifier of the sovereign principal granting this authority.

principalChain.description: The full chain of principals from root sovereign to immediate grantor, if this authority was delegated through intermediaries.

scope.description: The domains and resources within which the agent is authorized to operate.

systems.description: Identifiers of systems the agent may interact with.

dataCategories.description: Categories of data the agent may access.

memoryAccess.description: What memory the agent may read or write.

externalComms.description: Whether the agent may initiate communications with external systems not listed in 'systems'.

actions.description: Actions the agent is authorized to take.

limits.description: Quantitative or qualitative limits on this action.

requiresApproval.description: Whether this specific action requires explicit principal approval before execution.

prohibitions.description: Explicit actions the agent is prohibited from taking, regardless of other grants.

escalationPolicy.description: How the agent should behave when it encounters situations outside its defined authority.

escalateTo.description: Identifier of the principal or system to escalate to.

escalationMethod.description: How the agent communicates an escalation.

defaultOnEscalation.description: Default behavior if escalation contact is unavailable.

memoryPolicy.description: How the agent manages memory during and after its operation.

retainSessionMemory.description: Whether the agent retains session memory after the session ends.

shareMemoryWith.description: Identifiers of entities with which the agent may share memory.

memoryDispositionOnTermination.description: What happens to agent memory when the authority is revoked or expires.

subDelegation.description: Whether and how the agent may delegate authority to sub-agents.

permitted.description: Whether sub-delegation is permitted at all.

requiresPrincipalApproval.description: Whether the principal must approve each sub-delegation.

issued.description: When this authority envelope was issued.

revoked.description: Whether this authority has been revoked.

auditLog.description: URI or identifier of the audit log where agent actions under this authority are recorded.
